name: calendar
description: Create and inspect Anybox Calendar todos and events through a local MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Create and inspect Anybox Calendar items.
interface.longDescription: A local Anybox Calendar plugin that lets the agent create todos and events, then read projected Calendar items for verification.

mcpServers.name: Calendar
mcpServers.description: Create Anybox Calendar todos/events and list Calendar items.
permissions: Reads Calendar items from the local Anybox Agent API.
Creates Calendar todos and events in the local Anybox data store after approval.

tools.name: calendar_list_items
tools.title: List Calendar Items
tools.description: List projected Anybox Calendar items in an optional time range.

installReview: Runs a local Node.js MCP server bundled with Anybox.
Uses the local Anybox Agent Calendar API.
Create actions are configured to ask before execution.
